name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-53
title: tdd-context.py missing test-green→spec-update transition; contract.md stdout format and dead reads.files entry
description:
Three drifts:
1. tdd-context.py _ALLOWED_NEXT['test-green'] = ['deprecated'] but tdd-step.py _FORWARD_ALT (BUG-51 fix) adds 'test-green → spec-update' as a valid forward transition for cycle restart. tdd-context.py does not surface the cycle-restart path to subagents — they see only 'deprecated' as next. Also tdd-context.py guidance text for test-green still says 'Open a pull request now' instead of describing the cycle-restart option.
2. contract.md provides.scripts[].path for tdd-step.py claims stdout is '[rabbit] ━━━ ...' but Inv 5 of spec rewrites the format to '[🐇 rabbit 🐇] 🔧 ━━━ FROM_STATE -> TO_STATE ━━━ 🔧' (uppercase states, emoji brand). Contract prose is stale.
3. contract.md reads.files lists .claude/backlogs/<feature-name>/ but that directory does not exist post-rabbit-file unification (see CONTRACT-BACKLOG-19 finding). Read is dead.
Fix: add 'spec-update' to tdd-context.py _ALLOWED_NEXT['test-green']; update test-green guidance to mention cycle restart; refresh contract.md stdout format prose; drop the stale .claude/backlogs/ reads entry.
